test_cases.title: Verify successful AI-driven candidate shortlisting
steps: Upload a valid set of candidate resumes
test_cases.expected_result: The AI returns a relevant shortlist of candidates matching job criteria with proper ranking and no errors.

test_cases.title: Validate AI decision transparency report generation
test_cases.expected_result: The system generates a detailed transparency report explaining AI decision logic and rationale for each candidate.

test_cases.title: Test system behavior with invalid candidate resume file format
steps: Upload a corrupted or unsupported file format
test_cases.expected_result: The system rejects the file upload and displays an appropriate error message without crashing.

test_cases.title: Verify AI onboarding automation with incomplete employee data
steps: Log in as HR onboarding user
Start onboarding process for new employee with some missing required data fields
test_cases.expected_result: The system detects missing data, prompts user for correction, and does not proceed until mandatory fields are completed.

test_cases.title: Validate system performance under peak recruitment load
steps: Simulate 100 concurrent HR users accessing recruitment AI module
Upload multiple large batches of candidate data simultaneously
test_cases.expected_result: The system maintains response times under 3 seconds per action, no timeouts or crashes occur, and AI completes processing within SLAs.

test_cases.title: Security test: Validate data privacy compliance during AI decision processing
steps: Intercept communication between frontend and backend during AI decision processing
Attempt to access candidate personal data without authorization
Verify encryption and access controls on data in transit and at rest
test_cases.expected_result: No unauthorized data access is possible, all sensitive data is encrypted, and access is logged and restricted per compliance guidelines.

test_cases.title: Reliability test: Validate system recovery after AI module failure
steps: Simulate an AI module crash during candidate shortlisting
Observe system behavior and logged errors
Trigger system recovery or restart processes
test_cases.expected_result: System gracefully handles failure by logging detailed errors, notifying users, and recovers AI service automatically within defined timeout.

test_cases.title: Test AI decision making for potential bias and fairness with diverse candidate data sets
steps: Prepare candidate data sets with diverse demographic attributes
Analyze AI decisions for disproportionate exclusion or favoritism
test_cases.expected_result: AI decision results are balanced and fair, with no statistically significant bias detected in candidate selection.

test_cases.title: Validate scalability: AI performance when onboarding bulk employees
steps: Simulate onboarding 500 new employee records at once
Monitor system resource utilization and processing time
test_cases.expected_result: AI onboarding completes successfully within acceptable time limits without degradation of other system functions.

test_cases.title: Negative test: Submission of empty or null inputs to AI modules
steps: Submit empty or null form fields for candidate data and onboarding
test_cases.expected_result: System rejects empty inputs gracefully with validation messages and does not invoke AI processing.

results.failure_analysis: Transparency report generation failed due to null pointer exception during data aggregation.
System exceeded SLA with average response times over 5 seconds under peak recruitment load simulation.
AI module crash recovery timeout exceeded; automatic restart took longer than allowed threshold.

triaged_defects.root_cause_hint: Possible frontend rendering bug in HR dashboard components affecting data visualization.
Duplicate issue with frontend rendering causing UI anomalies on HR dashboard.
Core AI decision logic may have errors causing incorrect HR process outcomes, risking business impact.

defect_triage.release_risk_summary: Two clusters identified: UI display issues impacting user experience and a critical AI decision logic error risking HR process accuracy. Immediate fixes required for AI logic and UI bug; duplicate defect TC-0011-05 closed. Given medium project risk and capacity, addressing these defects before release reduces overall risk.

findings.draft_fix: Use parameterized queries or prepared statements for all database calls to sanitize inputs and prevent SQL injection. Replace direct string concatenation in SQL commands with safe query parameter syntax.
Remove hard-coded credentials from the configuration file. Implement environment variable injection or a secrets management solution to securely handle sensitive credentials.
Sanitize all user inputs and encode outputs properly before rendering on the frontend. Use a security library (e.g., DOMPurify) to neutralize any injection vectors in dynamic HTML rendering.
Avoid logging sensitive personal data or AI decision details in plaintext. Implement redaction or encryption of sensitive log entries to comply with privacy requirements.

quality_gate.gap_explanation: The release is blocked due to multiple failed critical quality gates: the test pass rate is below the minimum threshold of 95%, a critical defect remains open that requires fix before release, and there is an open high severity security finding (SQL Injection) that must be remediated. Although coverage is sufficient, these issues pose significant risks and must be addressed prior to release.
